{{Expand}}

{{Infobox territory
| name = King’s Domain
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] can join his authority to the [[King’s Domain]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Mine,” he said, as he joined his authority to the King’s Domain.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Territories]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
